news.title: OpenAI Faces Internal Backlash Over Pentagon Deal
gist: Hardware leader Caitlin Kalinowski resigned on March 7th following OpenAI's deal to deploy models on Pentagon classified networks.
The deal includes 'red lines' against mass surveillance but has sparked a #QuitGPT movement among staff and users.
news.full_summary: OpenAI's hardware lead Caitlin Kalinowski resigned after the company secured a contract to integrate AI models into the Pentagon's classified networks. While OpenAI insists on strict safeguards against lethal autonomous use and mass surveillance, internal dissent regarding military ethics has grown. This follows the acquisition of Promptfoo on March 9th to improve model reliability.
news.tip: Monitor OpenAI's 'Trust and Safety' updates for changes in usage policies regarding government and defense sectors.

news.title: Anthropic Sues US Government Over 'Supply Chain Risk' Label
gist: The DoD designated Anthropic a 'supply chain risk' after it refused to allow Claude to be used for lethal autonomous weapons.
Anthropic filed a lawsuit on March 10th, alleging the move was retaliatory and violates the First Amendment.
news.full_summary: Anthropic has entered a legal battle with the US administration after being labeled a supply chain risk by the Department of Defense. This designation forces federal agencies to phase out Claude. Anthropic claims this is retaliation for their refusal to participate in the development of autonomous lethal weaponry, highlighting the friction between AI safety labs and national defense priorities.
news.tip: Federal contractors should verify their compliance status if utilizing Claude via government-managed cloud instances.

news.title: GPT-5.4 'Thinking' System Completes Global Rollout
gist: The latest model features a 1-million-token context window and native 'computer use' capabilities.
A new 'Instruction Hierarchy' research paper released alongside it aims to prevent agentic prompt injections.
news.full_summary: OpenAI completed the rollout of GPT-5.4, a system designed for deep reasoning and direct OS interaction. The model can now control computer environments natively. To mitigate risks, OpenAI introduced a new 'Instruction Hierarchy' protocol, ensuring that system instructions take precedence over user-provided data during complex agentic tasks.
news.tip: Use the new 'Responses API' to build agents that can execute terminal commands or manage file systems directly.

news.title: Microsoft Unveils Copilot Cowork and $99 E7 Tier
gist: Copilot Cowork uses Anthropic's Claude models to automate multi-step workflows across the Office suite.
Microsoft 365 E7 tier bundles all 'Agent 365' capabilities for enterprise users.
news.full_summary: On March 10th, Microsoft announced 'Copilot Cowork,' a significant evolution of its AI assistant that leverages Anthropic's models for agentic tasks like rescheduling complex meetings and drafting decks across multiple apps. They also introduced the premium E7 licensing tier, which consolidates all advanced agentic tools into a single package.
news.tip: Review your Microsoft 365 license; E7 is required for full cross-app autonomous agent functionality.

news.title: Google Pixel 'Agentic' Drop Brings Gemini Actions to Mobile
gist: The March 2026 Pixel Drop enables Gemini to perform tasks like grocery shopping and multi-app research autonomously.
Wiz acquisition closed on March 11th to bolster AI-driven cloud security.
news.full_summary: Google’s latest Pixel update introduces 'Agentic AI' to Gemini, allowing it to perform multi-step real-world tasks with minimal supervision. Simultaneously, Google Cloud finalized its acquisition of Wiz, integrating its AI threat detection into the core cloud infrastructure to compete with Microsoft's enterprise security offerings.
news.tip: Enable 'Gemini Extensions' in your Pixel settings to allow the assistant to interact with third-party shopping and travel apps.

news.title: Meta Deploys AI Anti-Scam Shield Across WhatsApp and FB
gist: New AI technology proactively identifies and blocks scam ads and suspicious social engineering attempts.
Meta will allow rival chatbots to access the WhatsApp Business API in Europe for a trial period.
news.full_summary: Meta has deployed a new AI-driven security layer across its messaging ecosystem to combat a surge in AI-generated phishing and scams. Furthermore, in compliance with EU regulations, Meta announced it would allow ChatGPT and Claude to integrate with WhatsApp Business, opening its ecosystem to competitors for the first time.
news.tip: Report suspicious messages to help train the new anti-scam models specifically on localized fraud patterns.

tools.name: Microsoft Copilot Cowork
tools.description: An enterprise-grade AI teammate that autonomously manages files, projects, and communications across local and cloud environments.
tools.use_case: Automating project management, drafting cross-departmental reports, and proactive meeting scheduling.

tools.name: Gemini Cross-App Synthesis
tools.description: A Workspace tool that generates documents or presentations by pulling data from Emails, Chats, and Drive files simultaneously.
tools.use_case: Creating comprehensive project summaries or pitch decks using fragmented data from multiple sources.

tools.name: Nvidia Nemotron 3 Super
tools.description: An open-weights hybrid model (Mamba + Transformer) optimized specifically for multi-agent reasoning and long-context coding.
tools.use_case: Building autonomous software engineering agents and complex data analysis pipelines.

tools.name: ChatGPT Tasks
tools.description: A built-in automation tool for scheduling recurring AI jobs like weekly email summaries or automated Notion updates.
tools.use_case: Personal productivity automation without requiring third-party tools like Zapier or Make.

tools.name: Anthropic Enterprise Marketplace
tools.description: A hub for vertical-specific AI plugins (e.g., Legal, Finance, Medical) built on Claude for enterprise tools like Slack and Box.
tools.use_case: Deploying specialized AI for contract compliance, NDA triage, or financial auditing.

tools.name: OpenClaw Framework
tools.description: The leading open-source framework for building 'computer-use' agents that can operate any desktop software via vision and cursor control.
tools.use_case: Developing custom agents to automate legacy software that lacks modern APIs.

meme.description: The 'Six Fingers' conspiracy trended heavily on X after users spotted what looked like AI-generated artifacts (a sixth finger) in a high-stakes video address by Benjamin Netanyahu, fueling widespread 'deepfake paranoia' during the US-Iran-Israel conflict escalation.
